medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Originally it was not expected to be resectable, but actually he has had a good response. He presents this admission for resection of his mass and surrounding structures after receiving neoadjuvant chemotherapy.
medical_history.past_medical_history: His oncologic history dates back to approximately ___, at which time he developed worsening gas pains his stomach and increased burping. He also had about a 10-pound loss in only 1.5 months, prompting further evaluation by a primary care doctor, including an endoscopic evaluation and colonoscopy, which showed poorly differentiated gastric cancer.
medical_history.family_history: Notable for a sister who passed away secondary to lung cancer, father with history of prostate cancer. His mother had a stroke and a history of atrial fibrillation.

physical_examination.general_examination: Gen: Awake and alert, Resp: CTAB, CV: RRR, GI: Soft, nontender, well-healed incision, drain and pigtail in place, J tube in place.
